items.title: Confidence in Trump’s health plummets as he insists he’s on top of his game
items.summary: President Donald Trump, who will be turning 80 on June 14, insists that his health — both physical and mental — has never been better. But a Washington Post/ABC News/Ipsos poll released in late April, found that 59 percent of Americans believe he lacks the mental acuity to continue serving as president.
